description: Font Contract: measurable properties any UVAS-approved font must satisfy

x_height_ratio.description: Ratio of x-height to cap height
x_height_ratio.rationale: Higher x-height improves legibility at small sizes
x_height_ratio.test_method: Measure x-height / cap-height in font editor or via OpenType metrics

cap_height_ratio.description: Ratio of cap height to em square
cap_height_ratio.rationale: Proportional hierarchy between uppercase and lowercase

weight_range.rationale: Regular and bold minimum; medium/semibold for nuanced hierarchy

width_consistency.rationale: Prevents layout reflow when toggling bold

disambiguation.description: Character pairs that must be visually distinct

set_a.description: Capital I, lowercase l, digit one
set_a.common_failure: Slab serif I vs sans l
set_a.mitigation: I needs serifs or crossbar; l needs tail or hook; 1 needs flag

set_b.description: Digit zero, capital O, lowercase o
set_b.mitigation: Zero needs slash, dot, or narrower width

set_c.common_failure: Tight tracking collapses rn into m appearance
set_c.mitigation: Clear separation between r and n stems

set_d.common_failure: Curly quotes look identical to straight

set_e.mitigation: Clear length progression: hyphen < en-dash < em-dash

disambiguation.pass_criteria: All pairs distinguishable by naive observer at all test sizes

scale_stability.requirement: Legible at all scales without blur or collapse
scale_stability.test_method: Render at each scale, verify glyph clarity

contrast_theme_compatibility.requirement: No stroke collapse or blur under theme variants

fractional_dpi.requirement: No significant blur at fractional scaling
fractional_dpi.note: Windows ClearType and Linux FreeType handle differently

subpixel_degradation.requirement: Graceful degradation when subpixel rendering disabled

rhythm_stability.description: Even letter spacing without optical gaps
rhythm_stability.requirement: No visible rhythm breaks or 'shimmer' during reading

italic_distinctiveness.test_text: This is roman. This is italic.
italic_distinctiveness.note: Some accessibility fonts avoid true italics; oblique acceptable if distinct

weight_progression.requirement: Each step perceivably heavier than previous

partial.description: Passes static metrics and disambiguation; may have rendering edge cases
